Document:
# Item Distribution
1. Any items made using the protolathe or circuit imprinter and distributed to crew must be recorded. Information that must be recorded includes the distributor, the item's name(s) and the recipient.
2. The Research Director may choose to require an item request form to be distributed to crew for these purposes.
3. The pre-approved materials list in the Cargo SOP may be used to circumvent this requirements from 1 & 2.
4. Violations of Corporate Law using these items may result in charges against the science department.
